task:
Write a comprehensive Vitest test file for the exported functions in theme-colors.ts. Cover these functions:

1. deriveSchemeFromColors(primary, accent) - test with hex inputs, verify all returned fields are populated
2. buildThemeColors(theme?) - test with no args (defaults), partial theme, full theme
3. deriveSchemeAsHex(primary, accent) - test that surface/muted/border come back as hex strings
4. applyThemeColors(theme) - mock document.documentElement.style.setProperty and verify CSS custom properties are set

Also test the edge cases:
- Invalid hex inputs to deriveSchemeFromColors
- Empty/undefined theme to buildThemeColors
- Known color conversions (e.g. #FF0000 should produce hue ~0, #00FF00 hue ~120)

Use describe/it blocks. Import from '../lib/theme-colors'. Output ONLY a ```create:src/__tests__/theme-colors.test.ts``` block, nothing else.
